chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1765 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.11212/2025. 2. For orders as to maintainability. 29.05.2025 Mr. Muneer Ahmed, advocate for the petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2. On the last date, learned counsel was confronted as to maintainability hereof. Today new counsel seems to have been engaged and once again remains unable to assist on count of maintainability, inter alia, as to how respondent qualify within Article 199 of the Constitution; how the writ could be issued in the matters requiring factual dispute and how the concerned respondent is within the territorial remit of this court, especially when no order of Rule 7 of the Benches Order is placed on record. Petition is found to be mis- conceived, hence, dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
